files.00_Overview.md: Missing Learning Objectives and Key Takeaways sections. Add structured learning objectives at the beginning and key takeaways summary at the end. The mathematical foundations section is good but needs consistency in figure caption formatting.
files.01_Introduction.md: Content is comprehensive but has significant overlap with 00_Overview. Remove redundant Gauss theorem explanations (already in 00_Overview) and focus on the four operators introduction. Add Learning Objectives section.
files.02_fvc_vs_fvm.md: Well-structured comparison but missing Key Takeaways summary. Add summary section at end. The PISO algorithm section is excellent - preserve it. Add dimension checking tips for debugging.
files.03_Gradient_Operations.md: Comprehensive but could be condensed. Remove redundant Gauss theorem explanations. The scheme comparison table is good. Add Learning Objectives and Key Takeaways sections.
files.04_Divergence_Operations.md: Excellent conservation focus. Physical meaning table is great. Missing Key Takeaways section. Add summary of when to use fvc::div vs fvm::div.
files.05_Curl_and_Laplacian.md: Good coverage but the distinction between post-processing (curl) and governing equations (laplacian) could be clearer. Add Learning Objectives. The comparison table at the end is valuable - expand it.
files.06_Common_Pitfalls.md: Very practical debugging guide. The troubleshooting table is excellent. Add a section on time step selection best practices. Consider adding more mesh quality troubleshooting examples.
files.07_Summary_and_Exercises.md: Good content but exercises are limited. Add more hands-on coding exercises. Solution guide is good but could be more detailed. Add references to real OpenFOAM solver code for analysis.

global_strategy: This folder has strong technical depth with excellent OpenFOAM Context tags throughout, but suffers from: (1) Redundant mathematical explanations across files (Gauss theorem appears 3 times), (2) Inconsistent application of 3W Framework - some files have Learning Objectives/Key Takeaways while others don't, (3) Missing practical coding exercises that connect to real solver code. The refactoring should consolidate mathematical foundations in 00_Overview, add missing 3W framework sections to all files, and expand exercises to include actual code analysis tasks from OpenFOAM solvers like simpleFoam or pimpleFoam.
